Documentation.short_help: Sweep LiDAR extrinsics (RPY/XYZ) and rank by voxel occupancy
Documentation.long_help: Sweeps roll/pitch/yaw and X/Y/Z around the LiDAR-trajectory transform, aggregates selected frames, and scores by occupied voxels (lower is better). Use to verify or fine-tune extrinsics; set sweep ranges/steps, frame subset/stride, and voxel leaf size.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Translation Range
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Half-range in meters for X, Y, Z. Sweep is centered on the upstream sensor translation and spans [-range, +range] per axis.

IntVectorProperty.name: Translation Steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of samples along X, Y, Z. A value ≤ 1 disables sweep on that axis (center only).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Angle Range
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Half-range in degrees for Roll, Pitch, Yaw. Sweep spans [-range, +range] around the upstream sensor orientation.

IntVectorProperty.name: Angle Steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of samples for Roll, Pitch, Yaw. A value ≤ 1 disables sweep on that axis (center only).

IntVectorProperty.name: All Frames
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Use all input frames when enabled. When disabled, the [First Frame, Last Frame] range with Step Size is used.

IntVectorProperty.name: First Frame
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Start frame index (inclusive). Used only when All Frames is disabled.

IntVectorProperty.name: Last Frame
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: End frame index (inclusive). Used only when All Frames is disabled.

IntVectorProperty.name: Step Size
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Frame stride within the selected range. 1 = use every frame.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: Voxel Leaf Size
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Downsampling resolution in meters for the voxel grid. Larger values yield coarser aggregation and typically lower voxel counts.
